name: Nicotine+
description: Nicotine+ is a graphical client for the Soulseek peer-to-peer file sharing network, allowing users to search for, download, and share files with other Soulseek users. It also supports chat rooms and private messaging within the Soulseek community.
developer:
Nicotine+ Contributors
  Nicotine Contributors
  PySoulSeek Contributors
